Implementation level definitions (1-10): Level 1-3 = symptom-only fix. Level 4-6 = root-cause fix. Level 7-9 = structural fix + recurrence prevention + verification. Level 10 = structural fix + recurrence prevention + verification + regression tests + documentation.

Phase 1: 회귀 테스트 스위트 구축 [Level 10]. Run pytest agents/tests/test_regression.py.
